draft.alignment_policy: Exported B is the scoring timeline. A->B edit comparison uses absolute seconds on B where timing is available and marks encoded-draft material rows as timing failures until decoded.
draft.timing_note: Current Jianying draft_info/template files are encoded; exact editor timeline timings are unavailable from parseable JSON. Matrix uses key_value material inventory plus ffmpeg detections from edited_b.
